_comment: dialogue_grebblewick.json: This table is used for the npc chat in Grebblewick.

dialogue.greeting: Welcome to Grebblewick! Mind the gears, and don’t trip over the singing mushrooms.
dialogue.help: We’re testing a new steam-powered glider. Volunteers welcome—helmets optional.
dialogue.lore: They say Grebblewick was founded when a gnome fell off a skyship and decided to stay.
dialogue.farewell: Tinker well, and may your gadgets never explode—too badly.

dialogue.greeting: Magic is just science with flair. And maybe a few hallucinations.
dialogue.help: I need someone to test a spell that may or may not reverse gravity.
dialogue.lore: The Guild of the Eclipsed Mind believes reality is a suggestion. I suggest you duck.
dialogue.farewell: If you see a floating chicken, don’t panic. Probably.

dialogue.greeting: Come in, come in! Tea’s hot, beds are bouncy, and the gossip’s fresh.
dialogue.help: We’re short on honeycakes for the festival. Know any good foragers?
dialogue.lore: The inn’s been rebuilt six times. Last time, it was due to a teleportation mishap.
dialogue.farewell: Sleep tight, and don’t let the clockwork mice nibble your toes!
